title: Another notch! Emeril Lagasse Savory Spinach and Artichoke Stuffing
ingredients: 1 tbsp plus 2 tsp Emeril's Italian Essence, or other Italian seasoning blend
3 (8 ½ ounce) cans artichoke hearts (small size is best), drained
2 cups chicken, turkey or vegetable stock
1 pound Brie cheese, rind removed and cut into ½ inch cubes
½ cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
¼ cup minced fresh parsley leaves
instructions: Grease a 9"x13" baking dish with olive oil.
Bring a large pot of water to boil.
Add spinach and cook until just wilted, about 30 seconds.
Drain spinach and rinse with cold water.
Once cooled, squeeze as much water from spinach as possible, then roughly chop and reserve.
Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet.
Add onions and cook until golden brown and tender, about 5 minutes.
Add Italian seasoning, ½ tsp salt, ½ tsp pepper, and garlic and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add artichokes and cook, stirring, for another 2 minutes.
Combine eggs, cream, stock, lemon juice, remaining Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
Add bread, spinach mixture, Brie, ¼ cup Parmesan, and parsley and stir to combine.
Let sit for approximately 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until all liquid is absorbed.
Bake until firm in center, about 1 hour.
notes: This is an Emeril Lagasse recipe
Can use chicken, turkey, or vegetable stock
Allow the mixture to sit and absorb liquid before baking for best texture
